name: eleventy
description: Eleventy is a simpler static site generator

name: -v
--version
options.description: Show program's version number and exit

options.name: --watch
options.description: Wait for files to change and automatically rewrite

options.name: --output
options.description: Write HTML output to this folder

options.name: --serve
options.description: Run web server on port and watch them too

options.name: --port
options.description: Run Web Server on specified port

options.name: --config
options.description: Override the eleventy config file path

options.name: --pathprefix
options.description: Change all url template filters to use this subdirectory
